channel.title: Vox Language Updates
channel.description: Changelog, release notes, and documentation updates for the Vox AI-native programming language, maintained by the Vox Foundation.

item.title: Language surface SSOT (keywords, decorators, manifests)
item.description: Authoritative plan for unifying Vox language-surface metadata across LSP, MCP, docs, eval, and speech tooling.

item.title: Populi data pipeline (control plane vs Mens corpus)
item.description: Clarifies Populi/mesh runtime data paths versus Mens training corpus sources—two different pipelines that share orchestration branding.

item.title: Vox source → compiler → Mens training (pipeline SSOT)
item.description: End-to-end map from .vox text through the lexer and compiler to golden examples, corpus mix, and Mens (HF) training—without conflating compile tokens with model tokens.

item.title: Native ML Training Pipeline
item.description: End-to-end Mens ML pipeline: corpus → native Candle+qlora-rs QLoRA via vox mens train; Burn scratch path legacy.

item.title: AI-Augmented Testing & Hourglass Architecture Research (2026)
item.description: Synthesis of 2026 state-of-the-art AI-augmented testing, shifting from the traditional testing pyramid to an hourglass/honeycomb architecture driven by the Vox Internal Representation (HIR) and AI-to-AI integration.

item.title: Compiler IR Pipeline
item.description: Reference for the Vox Intermediate Representation emission, validation, and its role in machine-verifiable agent loops.

item.title: IR emission SSOT (HIR, WebIR, VoxIrModule)
item.description: Which CLI flags emit which JSON, and how they relate to ADR 012 WebIR.

item.title: Vox Memory System
item.description: Persistent, searchable long-term storage for agent knowledge with tiered primaries per concern.

item.title: Multi-repo context isolation: research findings 2026
item.description: Comprehensive synthesis of 2026 best practices for managing repository context isolation across AI agents, orchestrators, IDEs, and CI/CD pipelines. Covers scope enforcement, ignore-file SSOT, agent instruction files, memory architecture, security threats, and the vox catalog layer.

item.title: VCS for agent state and artifact snapshotting research 2026
item.description: Research on using Jujutsu, Sapling, and other VCS strategies to automatically snapshot agent state, replace manual Git, and harden artifact history.

item.title: VoxDB connection policy (SSOT)
item.description: Strict, degraded-optional, and legacy-schema policies for VoxDb connects; inventory of callsites by surface/crate; remediation pointer and rules for adding new connections without silent Codex drops.

item.title: Environment variables (SSOT)
item.description: Official documentation for Environment variables (SSOT) for the Vox language. Detailed technical reference, architecture guides, and impl

item.title: Vox IR Specification
item.description: Stability-first Intermediate Representation (IR) for machine-verifiable Vox programs.

item.title: vox-constrained-gen
item.description: API reference for vox-constrained-gen, the experimental grammar-constrained decoding crate.

item.title: vox-dei
item.description: API reference for the new HITL vox-dei crate (Doubt/Resolution logic).

item.title: AI CLI Generation Standard
item.description: Architecture and design principles for LLM-driven CLI command generation via internal AST representations.

item.title: Execution Time Budgeting and Agent Learning Research 2026
item.description: Research and feasibility analysis for dynamic execution time budgeting, wait forecasting, and autonomous latency adaptation within Vox DEI and Arca architectures.

item.title: HITL Doubt Loop (SSOT)
item.description: Canonical authority document for the HITL doubt system and Resolution Agent.

item.title: Legacy retirement roadmap (2026)
item.description: Machine-readable guide identifying retired and retiring code pathways in Vox. Prevents LLMs and contributors from building on deprecated surfaces. Last research audit: 2026-04-06.

item.title: Vox RAG and Autonomous Research Architecture 2026
item.description: Single source of truth for the Vox retrieval-augmented generation pipeline, Socrates hallucination gate, Tavily web search integration, CRAG loop, and agent-to-agent research handoff.

item.title: Coding Agent Instructions
item.description: Instructions and heuristics generated from recent codebase discoveries for coding agents operating on Vox.

item.title: Vox: The AI-Native Programming Language
item.description: Vox is an AI-native full-stack language that eliminates hallucinations via compiler-enforced reality. Compiles to Rust and TypeScript with zero-null discipline.

item.title: Human-In-The-Loop & Doubt
item.description: User-facing reference explaining the Doubt control mechanism and human resolution flow.

item.title: Tavily Integration SSOT
item.description: Complete reference for integrating Tavily AI search API into the Vox RAG pipeline. Covers endpoints, Rust SDK, Clavis secrets, CRAG flow, safety posture, and cost model.

item.title: Vox 0.4 Grand Migration Plan (Uncompressed)
item.description: Comprehensive research-to-practice implementation plan: 270+ atomic tasks translating 9 deep research clusters into a greenfield Vox 0.4 standard.

item.title: v0.8.0 — @require, @pure, @deprecated Decorators; 10 LSP Features
item.description: Added @require, @pure, and @deprecated decorators. Implemented 10 Language Server Protocol features including hover, go-to-definition, and inline diagnostics.

item.title: v0.7.0 — QLoRA Training Pipeline; Socrates Anti-Hallucination Protocol
item.description: Native QLoRA fine-tuning via Candle and qlora-rs. Socrates confidence protocol integrated into the orchestrator for anti-hallucination validation of agent outputs.

item.title: v0.6.0 — Mens Transport; Durable Workflow Runtime MVP
item.description: CPU-first mens registry with optional HTTP control plane. Interpreted workflow runtime MVP supporting local and mens activity hooks.
